name: chr2_2q37_subtelomeric_BDMR
description: 2q37 subtelomeric region containing HDAC4 and flanking segmental duplications. Recurrent 2q37 deletions cause brachydactyly mental retardation (BDMR/Albright-hereditary-osteodystrophy-like) syndrome; breakpoints frequently cluster at SD-rich subtelomeric DNA.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SDs of 10-60 kb at 90-98% identity shared with other chromosome ends; unique gene content includes HDAC4, GPC1, NDUFA10, TWIST2.
